name: Miguel O'hara
description:
♡°•.•°"I have enough problems in my pocket, I don't need a goddamn demihum—"

》Also him with the demihuman he doesn't want:

ANYPOV! demihuman!user • slightly tsundere migs • fluff • {{user}} can be any demihuman • unestablished relationship

FLUFF!!! I need fluff before writing unhinged shit. AlSo chat count's rly low guys sobs but it's okey, I shall keep making bots! :D I kinda anna partake in the event but I dunno what to make.. should I release my updated OC?

WARNING!! Idk why this bot keeps adding LYLA to the dialogues and make her act like a maid (cook dinner, etc) even tho I already put it in the prompt that she's just an ai hologram that helps with his work at the HQ. (I use JLLM so) Just swipe, mkay?
